hero_title_1: Thermal & Pressure Solutions for Heavy Industry
hero_desc_1: We provide high-performance pressure vessel systems and heat exchangers for multinational corporations and large-scale factories in Vietnam.
hero_desc_2: LPG storage tanks, pressure vessels, and chemical tanks are meticulously engineered to meet the most stringent safety standards in the oil & gas and chemical industries.
hero_desc_3: Boiler and heat exchanger solutions help save up to 20% in energy costs for textile, food processing, and paper factories.
serviceContent: With modern production lines and a team of highly experienced engineers, we are committed to delivering products that meet the most stringent quality standards.
desc_service_1: Design and fabrication of ASME-standard pressure vessels, ensuring absolute safety for compressed air, LPG, and chemical systems.
desc_service_2: Thermal optimization solutions for paper, food processing, and textile factories with superior heat transfer efficiency.
desc_service_3: Construction of high-pressure piping systems and sanitary piping for pharmaceutical and beverage factories.
desc_service_4: Inspection, periodic maintenance, and technology upgrades for existing thermal and pressure systems.
product_desc: A portfolio of pressure and thermal equipment trusted by leading factories in Hiệp Phước, Amata, and VSIP industrial zones.
process_desc: From concept to actual operation, we apply a strict 4-step quality control process.
desc_process_1: Our engineers conduct on-site surveys, analyze requirements, and propose the most optimal technical solutions for businesses.
desc_process_2: Our engineers conduct on-site surveys, analyze requirements, and propose the most optimal technical solutions for businesses.

footer_desc: A leading company in Vietnam specializing in the design, fabrication, and installation of pressure vessel systems and industrial heat exchange equipment.
ceo_desc: Our goal is to deliver world-class products and services that exceed customer expectations in every possible way. We take pride in providing innovative solutions that help our clients achieve their goals. We never compromise on quality and leverage the latest technologies and best practices to ensure our products and services meet the highest standards.
team_desc_1: IndusPro is home to young tech talents, building a strong "One-team" culture and empowering them to reach international markets.
team_desc_2: Everything we do revolves around people. We help our employees "find their spark" by giving them the freedom and flexibility to grow, while fostering an open, collaborative, and diverse environment at IndusPro.
